asset.title: Finance Model Solve
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A highly polished, legible, and honest stylized trace replay demonstrating an AI agent solving a financial model step-by-step.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly shows the AI agent locking cells, reading context, and writing formulas step-by-step.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the entire sequence from initial state, step-by-step execution, to final lock release.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode aesthetic with clear color-coded status indicators and smooth transitions.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the NodeRoom concept of agent-driven spreadsheet cell updates and versioning.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Stylized trace replay format is clean, though it is a simulated visualization rather than raw UI.

legibility.evidence: High-contrast text and formulas are easily readable at standard browser sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses financial modeling use cases, highly relevant to finance and engineering audiences.

productionHonesty.evidence: Explicitly labels itself as a 'Stylized trace replay', avoiding any false representation of raw UI.

observedEvidence: Stylized trace replay showing cell locks, reads, and formula writes across 23 steps.

defects.observed: The stylized view abstracts away the actual spreadsheet grid, which may limit immediate visual understanding of the layout.
defects.fix: Provide a secondary link or small inset showing the corresponding spreadsheet UI.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Stylized trace replay showing the AI agent locking cells, reading historical context, and writing versioned formulas to solve a financial model.
